catalog_script_client.name: Calculate Percentage (Obtained Change)

sys_update_version.name: catalog_script_client_fee4cb18c33172100a7bf3ddd4013175
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Apply for Admission">2c72e56ac39d32100a7bf3ddd4013147</cat_item><cat_variable>IO:460caed0c37d32100a7bf3ddd40131ad</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>false</isolate_script><messages/><name>Calculate Percentage (Obtained Change)</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {
    if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
        return;
    }

    // 1. Get both values
    // We re-fetch both values to ensure we always have the latest numbers
    var total = parseFloat(g_form.getValue('total_marks'));
    var obtained = parseFloat(g_form.getValue('obtained_marks'));

    // 2. Clear any previous error messages
    // This removes the red text if the user fixes their mistake
    g_form.hideFieldMsg('obtained_marks');

    // 3. Check if both fields actually have numbers in them
    if (!isNaN(total) && !isNaN(obtained)) {

        // --- VALIDATION START ---

        // Check A: Is obtained higher than total?
        if (obtained > total) {
            g_form.showFieldMsg('obtained_marks', 'Obtained marks cannot be greater than Total marks.', 'error');
            g_form.setValue('percentage', ''); // Clear the result so they can't submit invalid data
            return; // Stop the script here
        }

        // Check B: Is Total zero? (Prevents division by zero)
        if (total <= 0) {
            // You might not need an error here, but we shouldn't calculate
            return;
        }

        // --- VALIDATION END ---

        // 4. Calculate Percentage
        var result = (obtained / total) * 100;

        // 5. Set Value (formatted to 2 decimal places)
        g_form.setValue('percentage', result.toFixed(2));

    } else {
        // If one field is empty, clear the percentage
        g_form.setValue('percentage', '');
    }
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-12-10 01:54:54</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>fee4cb18c33172100a7bf3ddd4013175</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Calculate Percentage (Obtained Change)</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="AUMS" source="x_595775_automat_0">ceb9dde6c35d32100a7bf3ddd4013136</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="AUMS">ceb9dde6c35d32100a7bf3ddd4013136</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_fee4cb18c33172100a7bf3ddd4013175</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-24 20:11:30</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>0</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>
